No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on language and literature, with no explicit or inferred connection to poverty eradication or related economic targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or learning outcomes that relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course does not address health services, disease prevention, mental health, or general well-being in any capacity.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education and fosters cultural understanding, humanistic literacy, and critical thinking, directly aligning with Target 4.7's emphasis on cultural diversity and sustainable development knowledge.
